THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF P.J.'S OYSTER BED, INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO RESTAURANT SUPPLY CO. $2,910.00 PRINCIPAL, $36.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,946.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
